steps.t: Phocas has asked you to head north to Jeb Khâtel and find the Orcs that dwell there.
Your presence in Kafagur has not gone unnoticed, but many of the Orcs seem unwilling to talk to you. You should find someone who is willing.
You've found an Orc in Kafagur named Grúshul who wishes to speak with you. You should talk to her.
Grúshul has given you permission to meet with the elder, Zagdúr. You should find her in Kafagur.
You have found Kafagur's elder, as well as a familiar Orc by her side -- Shúkurz. You should talk to him.
Zagdúr has politely interrupted your reunion with Shúkurz. You should talk to her in Kafagur.
